title: Korea memory cycle + leverage
question: Is Korea's memory-stock retail leverage a death-spiral risk?
finding: Death spiral NOT found. On the available proxy, Korea equities *rebound* after a worst-decile drop (positive at all four horizons; deepest tail 21d +4.8% / 63d +8.3%, significant positive) — the opposite of a margin cascade. Hedged Conditional: the clean Samsung/SK Hynix single-name limb is data-blocked.
